title: Scene (timeline.json shots[] entry, v2 — additive over the v1 bake contract)

id.description: Stable scene identity. PascalCase for Remotion comps.

cue.description: v1: narration cue this scene lands on

asset.description: v1 bake contract. DERIVED: always equals versions[active].file. Never hand-edited once versions exist.

enabled.description: v1: disabled scenes stay in the plan, bake skips them

z.description: overlays only: stacking order, low renders first

transition_in.description: Owns exactly the overlap it needs; validator permits same-lane overlap only where an xfade claims it

fit.description: Policy when active version duration != slot duration

props.description: Remotion engine only: values for the composition's exported propsSchema, passed via --props

active.description: vid of the active version; null = planned/no take

versions.description: APPEND-ONLY. Files are write-once and hash-named; overwriting is structurally impossible.

vid.description: v1, v2, … or cand-<hash4> for unpicked candidates

conformed.description: true once ingest transcoded to comp-native

spec.description: The regeneration contract: prompt/model/seed/params or comp+props. Stored verbatim from the job.

parent_vid.description: Which take this revises — the revision DAG
